Name: Average time for Accepted + Wait - User across all process variants
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Accepted + Wait - User and the end of the case

Name: Total time spent in Accepted + Wait - User per case
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity Accepted + Wait - User and the end of the case

Name: Minimum time required to complete Accepted + Wait - User after its initiation
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity Accepted + Wait - User and the end of the case

Name: Time elapsed from the start of Accepted + In Progress to the start of Accepted + Wait - User
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + In Progress' and activity 'Accepted + Wait - User'

Name: Time between the end of Queued + Awaiting Assignment and the start of Accepted + Wait - User
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Accepted + Wait - User'

Name: Duration of Accepted + Wait - User compared to the duration of Completed + In Call within the same variant
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - User' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + In Call occurs

Name: Time from the completion of Accepted + Wait - User to the start of Completed + Resolved
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - User' and activity 'Completed + Resolved'

Name: Average time for Accepted + Wait - User in variants that include Completed + In Call versus variants that do not
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - User' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + In Call occurs

Name: Time between the end of Accepted + Assigned and the start of Accepted + Wait - User
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Assigned' and activity 'Accepted + Wait - User'

Name: Elapsed time from case creation to the start of Accepted + Wait - User
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Unmatched + Unmatched' and activity 'Accepted + Wait - User'

Name: Duration of Accepted + Wait - User in variants where it directly precedes Completed + Resolved
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - User' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + Resolved occurs

Name: Time difference between Accepted + Wait - User and Accepted + Wait - Implementation when both occur in the same case
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - User' and activity 'Accepted + Wait - Implementation'

Name: Time from the end of Accepted + Wait - User to the execution of Completed + In Call in cases where both activities appear
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - User' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Cycle time of Accepted + Wait - User measured from its first occurrence to its last occurrence in multi-instance cases
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - User' and activity 'Accepted + Wait - User'

Name: Time elapsed between consecutive occurrences of Accepted + Wait - User in the same case
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - User' and activity 'Accepted + Wait - User'

Name: Duration of Accepted + Wait - User relative to the total case resolution time in variants ending with Completed + Closed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - User' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + Closed occurs

Name: Time between the start of Accepted + In Progress and the end of Accepted + Wait - User in linear sequences without intermediate queuing
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + In Progress' and activity 'Accepted + Wait - User'

Name: Time from the end of Accepted + Wait - User to the next occurrence of Accepted + In Progress
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - User' and activity 'Accepted + In Progress'

Name: Duration of Accepted + Wait - User when followed by Completed + In Call versus when followed by Completed + Resolved
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - User' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + In Call occurs

Name: Time interval between the start of Accepted + Wait - User and the final closure of the case (Completed + Closed)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - User' and activity 'Completed + Closed'
